title: Design review — onboarding flow
transcript:
Alice: Let's walk through the redesign.

Dan: The empty state on the dashboard is the first thing new users see — it needs more guidance. Today it just says 'No meetings yet'. We should add a primary CTA pointing at the new-meeting modal.

Alice: Agreed. Let's also surface a sample meeting card in a muted style so people understand the shape of what they're about to create.

title: Engineering all-hands
transcript:
Carol: Welcome everyone. Three things on the agenda: the deployment incident, hiring updates, and the Q3 roadmap draft.

Bob: On the deploy — root cause was the migration script timing out on the largest tenant. We've split it into batches and added a circuit breaker. Postmortem doc is in the team folder.

Carol: Good. Hiring — two offers out, both should close by Friday. Roadmap — sending the draft to leads tomorrow for feedback.
